PLAINTIFF'S DESIGNATION OF RECORD ON CROSS-APPEAL AND REQUEST FOR CLERK AND REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEMESA, CLAIRE
ESTIMATE REQUEST IS FOR CROSS APPEAL'S PROCESS.

REMITTITUR FILED THE TRIAL COURT RULED ON BOTH MOTIONS AT AN AUGUST 8, 2000 HEARING. THE TRIAL COURT DENIED THE MOTION TO COMPEL, BUT ALSO DENIED APPELLANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR DEFEATING DEFENDANT'S MOTION. FOR THE FORGOING REASON THE TRIAL COURT'S ORDER DENYING APPELLANT'S REQUEST FOR ATTY'S FEES IS REVERSED AND REMANDED FOR FURTHER PROCEEDING CONSISTENT WITH THIS ORDER.

ARBITRATION OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-24-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO COMPLETE ARBITRATION. ARBITRATION JURISDICTION IS EXTENDED THRU 10-22-99. OSC TO ALL COUNSEL. ALL MUST APPEAR UNLESS AN AWARD HAS BEEN FILED. HEARING SET FOR NOV-02-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PLAINTIFF'S SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED.

TRIAL RESUMES WITH ALL PRESENT AS HERETOFORE. TESTIMONY RESUMES. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. COURT GRANTS NON-SUIT AS TO PROPERTY DAMAGE AND FUTURE PAIN & SUFFERING. COUNSEL PRESENTS ARGUMENTS.THE COURT ANNOUNCES THE FOLLOWING DECISION. PLAINTIFF CLAIRE DEMESA IS TO HAVE DAMAGES OF $1000 FROM DEFENDANT MICHELLE PAULE, DAMAGES OF $500 EACH FROM DEFENDANTS MARIA PEREZ AND JESSICA TORRES AND THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANT MICHELLE PAULE SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF CROSS-COMPLAINT AGAINST CROSS-DEFENDANT CLAIRE DEMESA.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAULE, MICHELLE PEREZ, MARIA TORRES, JESSICA MICHELLE PAULE FOR $1000.00 MARIA PEREZ FOR $500.00 JESSICA TORRES FOR $500.00 FURTHER JUDGMENT FOR CROSS DEFENDANT CLAIRE DEMESA AND AGAINST CROSS COMPLAINANTS MICHELLE PAULE, MARIA PEREZ AND J ESSICA TORRES. COSTS AWARDED TO PLTFF CLAIE DE MESA AGAINST ALL DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $577.25
